meta.title: Japan's Response to the Shifting Global Order & Turning Points of Modern Sino-Japanese Relations
meta.description: Sarah Paine, Shin Kawashima, Arthur Herman and Lewis Libby on the strategic jostling underlying WWII and the Korean War.
